# Hale Digital

> Hale (Hale Digital) is a strategy-led performance marketing agency for growth-stage brands that have outgrown their current marketing setup. Hale connects strategy, paid media, organic performance, website development, analytics, and AI search into one growth system, led by senior practitioners rather than junior staff.

## What Hale does
- Diagnoses what is actually holding growth back before recommending tactics.
- Connects the disciplines that move growth — marketing strategy, performance/paid media, organic performance (SEO), website development and CRO, analytics & measurement, and AI search optimization — so they work as one system instead of in isolation.
- Serves brands in three situations: scaling fast (keeping momentum), plateaued (restarting momentum after the old playbook stops working), and established (turning marketing into a reliable growth engine).
- Flagship entry point: the Performance Growth Audit — a focused review of strategy, media, organic, website conversion, and measurement.

## Who Hale is for
Growth-stage consumer and service brands with real traction and marketing activity that have hit the ceiling of their current setup. Industries include DTC & ecommerce, retail, franchise & multi-location, consumer brands, food & beverage, and financial services.

- Contact: https://www.wearehale.com/contact/

## What Hale is NOT
- Not a single-channel ads shop or "we manage your Facebook ads" agency — Hale's position is that paid media performs better when organic, CRO, email, and analytics are strong around it.
- Not a junior-staffed agency that learns on the client's budget — senior people stay close to both strategy and execution.
- Not affiliated with unrelated entities that share the name "Hale" (e.g. Hale Groves, Hale pet doors, or individuals named Hale). This is Hale Digital, the performance marketing agency (haledigital.com → wearehale.com).

## Contact
Book a Performance Growth Audit or a consultation at https://www.wearehale.com/contact/
